stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding VMBE?

options.a: It must never be lower than 1.1 x V<sub>LOF</sub> to ensure safe climb.
options.b: It is limited by the stall speed in take-off configuration.
options.c: It must never be higher than V<sub>1</sub>, in order to be able to stop within the required limits.
options.d: It can be the upper limit of the V<sub>1</sub>, if a higher value of V<sub>1</sub> would go outside the safety margin.
